title: Create: Bananas
description: This emotional mod adds the long-needed support for Create bananas. Fixed MANY lives!
body:
[this is the create version of mekanism plums to bridge this community together](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-plums/)

# About
Create is really, really, a great mod. But for me, something was always missing. A tiny piece, yet a cornerstone. A speck of dust, yet probably so life-changing. Then it struck. It paralized me to the core... Create never had banana support. It has never had plums. Oh my god. Gut wrenching.
# Goals
This mod aims to fix the lives of dozens with its simplistic morale boosting goal - fixing something that cracked people so deeply that they never knew it was broken. Everyone needs bananas, so we delivered. You can get your bananas by mechanically pressing an apple (because everyone knows apples are also fruit) with blaze powder. You'll get a ripe, tasty, satisfying banana. That is what this is all about. It's about efficiently delivering things everyone needed. We are a lifeline.
# Afterword
We hope this world will be more demanding of those with power to give. And we hope that those powerless, who we once were, will strive to create and reclaim what's ours.
